details: The agent successfully visited all three sites and reported accurate information: (1) Wikipedia - correctly identified Graydon Hoare as the creator of Rust, (2) GitHub - reported 111,651 stars (112k), which matches the 100k+ known fact, (3) rust-lang.org - correctly reported the tagline 'A language empowering everyone to build reliable and efficient software.' All three sites were visited with evidence from actual page content.
